basic_details.job_title: Bharathidasan University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bharathidasan University is recruiting 1 Project Assistant under the prestigious DST-ANRF National Science Chair.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | desirable: Research experience in relevant area, reference letter | age limit: As per ANRF / University norms
qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Physics with specialization in Nonlinear Dynamics and Nonlinear Electronics

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application and bio-data Interview for shortlisted candidates Date of interview will be intimated to the candidates
how_to_apply: Interested candidates may send their bio-data along with a reference letter and relevant supporting documents to the Principal Investigator.

By Post to: Prof. M. Lakshmanan Professor of Eminence and DST-ANRF National Science Chair Department of Nonlinear Dynamics School of Physics Bharathidasan University Tiruchirappalli – 620 024, Tamil Nadu
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and project-based. Emoluments will be as per ANRF norms. The tenure of the position is up to 30 September 2026. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The decision of the selection committee will be final.

content_sections.heading: Bharathidasan University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Bharathidasan University, Tiruchirappalli has invited applications for the post of Project Assistant in the “DST-ANRF National Science Chair” project. Project Title: DST-ANRF National Science Chair Project Principal Investigator: Prof. M. Lakshmanan, Professor of Eminence and DST-ANRF National Science Chair, Department of Nonlinear Dynamics, School of Physics. Download Bharathidasan University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Bharathidasan University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates may send their bio-data along with a reference letter and relevant supporting documents to the Principal Investigator. By Post to: Prof. M. Lakshmanan Professor of Eminence and DST-ANRF National Science Chair Department of Nonlinear Dynamics School of Physics Bharathidasan University Tiruchirappalli – 620 024, Tamil Nadu Last Date: 10 July 2026

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Bharathidasan University Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and project-based. Emoluments will be as per ANRF norms. The tenure of the position is up to 30 September 2026. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The decision of the selection committee will be final.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Bharathidasan University Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 10 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for Project Assistant at Bharathidasan University?
faq.answer: M.Sc. in Physics with specialization in Nonlinear Dynamics and Nonlinear Electronics.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Assistant under DST-ANRF National Science Chair?
faq.answer: Emoluments will be paid as per ANRF norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in Bharathidasan University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the duration of the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The tenure is up to 30 September 2026.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for Bharathidasan University DST-ANRF Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Send your bio-data with reference letter to Prof. M. Lakshmanan by post or email on or before 10 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent job at Bharathidasan University?
faq.answer: No. It is a purely temporary project position.

faq.question: Q8. Who is the Principal Investigator for this DST-ANRF project?
faq.answer: Prof. M. Lakshmanan, Professor of Eminence and DST-ANRF National Science Chair.

faq.question: Q9. Is prior research experience mandatory for this position?
faq.answer: Specialization in Nonlinear Dynamics is essential. Prior research experience will be an added advantage.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the location of the project at Bharathidasan University?
faq.answer: The project is located at the Department of Nonlinear Dynamics, School of Physics, Bharathidasan University, Tiruchirappalli.
